title: Strait of Hormuz threat level raised to 'severe' after Iran attacks tankers using U.S. Navy route
summary_full: Iran's military has warned it will target ships that do not use a northern route approved by Tehran.
summary_public: Iran's military has warned it will target ships that do not use a northern route approved by Tehran.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran attacks tankers using U.S. Navy route
